name: Select Federal Credit Union
description_short: Select Federal Credit Union is a community-focused credit union serving Eastside San Antonio residents with $41M+ in assets and over 7,000 members since 1939.
description_long:
Select Federal Credit Union was originally chartered in 1939 as a San Antonio railroad federal credit union to serve employees of the Southern Pacific S.A. Division Railroad. The organization expanded its field of membership to the broader community in 1986, transforming from a railroad-exclusive institution into a regional credit union. Today, Select FCU maintains over 7,000 members and assets exceeding $41 million, positioning itself as a stable financial institution rooted in the Eastside San Antonio community.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including multiple savings accounts, checking accounts, credit and debit cards, auto loans, and personal loans. Members can access these services through free online banking, free mobile banking, and a free telephone audio response system called Select 24. All savings accounts are protected by National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) insurance up to $250,000. The institution provides quarterly statements for accounts without ACH activity and monthly statements for those with regular transfers.

Select FCU distinguishes itself through its localized community focus and membership eligibility structure based on residency, student status, or church membership within its defined field of membership. The credit union emphasizes personalized, individual service and explicitly positions itself around helping members save money, improve credit scores, and achieve overall financial well-being. This contrasts with larger national institutions by offering relationship-based banking with dedicated member service representatives.

While the website demonstrates basic financial services and NCUA insurance protections, the company provides limited detail about specific loan products, interest rates, fees beyond the downloadable schedule, or competitive advantages in pricing. The membership eligibility restrictions, while community-focused, may limit accessibility compared to banks with open enrollment. No information is provided regarding branches, ATM networks, or service hours beyond a single phone number.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: All savings accounts are NCUA-insured up to $250,000, providing federal deposit protection
Free online banking, mobile banking, and telephone banking (Select 24) with no access fees
Long-established institution founded in 1939 with $41M+ in assets and 7,000+ members
Multiple account types and loan products available including auto loans and personal loans
Personalized member service with representatives committed to individual financial needs
Community-oriented institution focused on member well-being and credit score improvement
Membership application process available to verify eligibility for residents, students, and church members
cons: Restricted field of membership limits eligibility—only open to students, residents, or church members of Eastside San Antonio
Website provides no specific interest rates, APRs, or fee details beyond references to downloadable documents
No information about branch locations, hours, or ATM network access on the main website
Limited online presence with no details about customer service response times or support channels beyond a phone number
Smaller institution with $41M in assets may offer fewer products or services compared to larger regional or national credit unions
best_for: Eastside San Antonio residents seeking community-focused banking with personalized service
Students and church members within Select FCU's field of membership looking for traditional credit union products
Consumers prioritizing relationship banking and individual member service over digital-first experiences
Members seeking NCUA-insured savings with accessible online and mobile banking options
diagnosis: Select FCU is best for Eastside San Antonio residents, students, and church members who value community-focused banking and personalized service from an established, NCUA-insured credit union. The main caveat is its restricted field of membership—eligibility is limited to specific geographic areas and groups, making it inaccessible to the general public, and the website lacks transparency on rates and specific product terms.
services: Savings accounts with quarterly or monthly statements
Product and service discounts for members
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
